textByHash.00762ed34e3afb352d641e0212cb7292952e00e3: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you're interested, I can change your respawn point to Kourend Castle.
textByHash.08dc2d98c6b8c51c61cf3f5100fbb1dbb066ec83: Thank you friend. You'll find Mount Karuulm on the other side of Lovakengj. Please hurry.
textByHash.0964f9502a16edbbc2e41270e58310cb809a2f89: Please hurry to Mount Karuulm. The Tasakaal may be the only ones who can save us. You'll find the volcano on the other side of Lovakengj.
textByHash.0c02b3bb4e0348f8a07e49d688462fcc51aab879: Ever since the Ascent of Arceuus, our people have been kept alive by the Dark Altar. Its power sustains our bodies in the same way yours is sustained by food and drink.
textByHash.0e9b5de45b515872131c0b27d96581505bd9ddf9: I'm afraid we don't quite know ourselves yet. A short while ago, our instruments detected fluctuations in power from the Dark Altar.
textByHash.1fe9103dd341ee579a6429c75d5999da648cc51b: But our people's lives are in danger and you may well be the only one who can save us.
textByHash.25164444c61be4f361305b27278db9767959e551: It seems the loss in power had an interesting impact on our experiments though. Some trapped souls that we were working to free were suddenly released.
textByHash.282c5fb9da3655604d9cdc346f4d8ad3ffce0193: Time is not on our side though, and I fear we won't be fast enough.
textByHash.2c4bb7e2e1b291fb940d9681b7659653055b5a6a: The King's late father asked for an advisor from Arceuus. He was keen for us to have a more central role than we did under the Council.
textByHash.2e9c1d96dc69d3127de5bc250bdb76348f82d750: Hello there. Would you like me to change your respawn point to Kourend Castle?
textByHash.363b0d79b2cbf355d76a5081fe52b1bf96c0c393: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you want, I can revert your respawn point to Lumbridge.
textByHash.458e0b95275ba8421be626e19d206175ca6dc1e7: A death? No! My father acted as fast as he could, but it sounds like he was not fast enough. This is a dark day for Arceuus.
textByHash.4b2c04389293e6318f37768d9da4ff16560e07ee: Very well. From now on, you will respawn in Lumbridge.
textByHash.4b73d830afc20cdbb609b270bea078d16407e7d8: He does seem willing to take on my advice, which is very welcoming. I hope he remains humble. It is a trait many leaders lack.
textByHash.4d3292d4042b31619661b1c2a6bc33d56a535710: Before we could do anything, we all felt a strange loss of power, as if the Altar had failed altogether.
textByHash.5b0a52b1c200bfeedc8c7fe2d9b272f3e4623ebb: It's believed by most that the knowledge of immortality was discovered by my father. The truth is, the discovery was not his.
textByHash.66e3ed11ae75b13a53f6226700e1ac10f5634cc4: My father was quick to act, using himself as a conduit to channel what little power the Altar had left.
textByHash.6775c5d217380b4fbaecb4bffc403c984d8e259e: Dear Thana, you did not deserve this fate. Thank you for bringing this terrible news to us. I will make sure someone is sent out to take care of Thana and Mori.
textByHash.6b63151c5fca89d3a93b489f9fb46971b002b081: If we can't find and fix whatever has caused this loss of power, our people are surely doomed. Now that those souls have been dealt with, we can perform tests both here and at the Altar to try and find the problem.
textByHash.95dc0c7356db5c4718cfb2d1fa2d106922a86b1d: Well... There is a secret known only to a few of us. At any other time, I would never dream of telling an outsider.
textByHash.970e964fbccc44635aa2da501459bd000e631222: To the west of here, lies the sulphur volcano of Mount Karuulm. Within live the Tasakaal, three ancient beings with power over life and death. They granted my father the knowledge that led to the Ascent of Arceuus.
textByHash.9ed490e9728c2a366326698531e1e0b05d306447: You've done a great service to the people of Arceuus. Thank you.
textByHash.a07205d23c5e2b8d211a031bc75d04bd4972a511: Hello there. Would you like me to revert your respawn point to Lumbridge?
textByHash.ae896f8c602ca9bc4f1f105ee24b0ac997722d33: Thank you for helping us out with those souls. As you can see, we're facing quite the crisis.
textByHash.bd51f3d8553350f33ba95bf1731c8c252ee6773e: Alas, whatever happened seemed to cause them great pain, making them to go feral. They are now at peace though, thanks to you.
textByHash.c4dc80de1bccdcd42903bf16763c433497842189: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you're interested, I can offer you the ability to respawn at Kourend Castle upon death.
textByHash.caef8f8bc68c0732541548f5f38e1549a5fdd91d: The Altar is currently giving out a fraction of the power it normally would. The only thing keeping us alive is my father. His strength won't last forever though.
textByHash.e23618c688ef9882de6f59c127b4279c4cb32fcf: Very well. From now on, you will respawn at Kourend Castle.
textByHash.e245468aa90e01f56828891dfb0db4c69e9f3815: Let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.ee348ecf55d119290907df9351ba608248988150: Without the power of the Dark Altar, there's nothing to keep our people alive. The loss in power from the Altar will be what killed Thana.
textByHash.f697e9df4e9444eacb294b36b73ae44d76227cd8: Whatever you did, it seems to have worked. Everything is back to normal. You should talk to my father, he'll want to thank you.
textByHash.f6daee73050f3d8245d8ca0ef6888cdf7401900c: Their knowledge of the Dark Altar far exceeds ours. If anyone can help us, it's them. Ideally I'd send one of our own, but I have no one to spare. You are the only one who can help us.
